people.person: a man with red hair and a woman with dark hair
people.action: walking and looking at a large, old-looking map

scene.setting: a dimly lit stone corridor with light streaming in from a high window, casting long shadows.

objects.description: A large, old-looking map with Latin text and intricate designs, held by the man.

interactions.interaction: The man and woman are walking together and looking at the map.

key_actions: The man holds the map and points at a specific location.
The woman looks at the map and then at the man.
visual_objective.visibility_notes: The lighting changes from dim to bright as they move.

visual_expression.person: a man with red hair and a woman with dark hair
body_cues: the man points at the map
the woman leans in to look
visual_expression.gaze: looking at the map and then at each other

audio_description: A male voice speaks in an agitated tone, followed by a female voice speaking in a calm tone.
